offer.title: Welcome back
offer.body: You have assistants on this computer from before. Bring them with you and pick up right where you left off.
offer.found: We found {{agents}} across {{workspaces}} on this computer.
offer.foundWithHistory: We found {{agents}} across {{workspaces}} on this computer, along with your past conversations.
offer.timeNote: Bringing everything over can take a few minutes.
offer.startFreshHint: You can keep using Houston without your old data. It stays safe on this computer.

progress.title: Bringing your data over
progress.body: Your assistants are being set up in the cloud. This can take a few minutes while your conversations come along.
progress.preparing: Getting your data ready. This can take a few minutes.
progress.startFailed: We couldn't read your old data.

done.title: Your assistants made it
done.summary_one: {{count}} assistant is now in the cloud, with everything it needs.
done.summary_other: {{count}} assistants are now in the cloud, with everything they need.
done.leftBehindBody: These assistants didn't come along this time. Their data stays safe on this computer.
done.excludedTitle: Some larger files stayed on this computer
done.rejectedTitle: A few items couldn't come along
done.reconnectAiBody: For your security, your AI sign-in doesn't carry over. Connect it once and you're back to normal.
done.reconnectAppsBody: Your assistants used these apps before. You can connect them again anytime from the Apps section.
